description: 3-donor panel validated against R augsynth. Treated = 0.5*D1 + 0.5*D2 (pre) + ATT=1.5 (post). D3 is offset (D3=D1+2), donor pool is overdetermined. Synthetic post with w=[0.5,0.5,0]: [8.5,9.5,10.5]. Treated post = [10.0,11.0,12.0] → ATT=1.5. augsynth::augsynth(Ridge) gives ATT≈1.5 on noise-free data.
